383 
RNDRNG_PHYSN_SPCLTY_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim or Revenue Center Rendering Physician Specialty Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the CMS specialty code of the rendering physician/practitioner. 
Effective 7/2012 with CR#7, the code used to identify the CMS specialty code of the rendering 
physician/practitioner (identified using the NPI) whose services qualify for an
